pericopes.title: Thessalonica mite Pathen tahsan chule avetkahna
Pakai Jesu hungkit teng mithi le mihing

chapters.text: Paul, Silvanus chule Timothy’n, Pa Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a um Thessalonica Houbung mite hengah: Nahenguva lungsetna le chamna um hen.
Katao chanun nangho kaphauvin nangho nabonchauva dingin Pathen kathangvah jing jiuve;
keihon tahsana nathilbolu ngailutna a nathohgimu chule i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa a kinepna neiya nathoh hatnau chu i-Pathenule i-Pau anga sumil louhelin kageldoh jingui.
Vo Pathena sopi deitah ho, lhendoh nahiu chu kaheuvin,
kathu hilu Kipana Thupha hi thu keo jenga nahengu hung lhunga hilouvin, thilbol thei thahat le Lhagao Thenga hetna kichentah-a hungjoh ahi, keiho nangho dinga itobang mi kahiu nanghon nahenauve.
Chule nangho hesoh gentheina nasatah lah-a Lhagao Theng kipana a thu chu anasanga, keiho le Pakai umchan thoa nahitauve.
Chutia chu Macedonia le Achaia gama um atahsan ho dinga vettoh-a jui dinga uma nahitauve.
Ajeh chu nanghoa kona Macedonia le Achaia gam sunga Pakai thu chu thangdoh ahi, chule hiche jeng chu hilouvin, Pathen lama natahsan jeu chu gamtinah akithangtan ahi; keiho seisei angaipoi.
Ajeh chu amahotah-in keiho umchan thudol nangho kom kahung lutjeu umchan chule nangho Pathen hing le dihtah chu hou dinga,
chule khonunga hung lhung ding lunghanna kona eihuhdoh uva a-Chapa Jesu, athia kona akaithou chu, vana kona ahung ding ngah dinga, milim houva kona Pathen lama nakiheijeu chu ahil lhangleu ahi.
Chuti chu ahin, sopiteho, nahenguva kahungu chu moh ahipoi, ti nangho tah-in nahenauve;

ahin amasanga Philippi khopia hesoh genthei kathoh a chule jachat umtah-a eikibol jenga jong, hichu nahetsau ahi; hangsana noa Pathen thupha chu nangho jah-a sei dinga kaPathena hangtah a kanapan u ahi.
Ajeh chu kathu hilu hi suhkhela kon ahipoi, thenglouva kon jong ahipoi, duha a jong ahipoi;
ahin Pathenin aphai tia eitahsan jeh a thupha vopsah dinga eigot bangtah a thu kaseiyu ahibouve; mihem lunglhaisah louva kalung sungu photoh Pathen lunglhaina kaseiyu ahi.
Imatihchana pachat lhem panlou kahiuve, hichu nanghon naheuve, papset khuna a jong mangji lou kahiuve, Pathen ahetoh ahi;
Christa solchah kahiu hi, thu neitah hiding kahiuvin, ahivangin nangho nahiuvin, mi dang ahin koimacha a konin ginle ja kaholpouve.
Nalah uva nunnemin numei naovet them naonoi pelaiyin achate akhoukhah banga,
nangho kakhoto jeh uva Pathen thupha jeng hilouva nangho kadeitah-u nahitah jeh uva, keihon kahinna chengu sana nangho peh ding kalungu ahi.
Ajeh chu sopiteho, katohgim le kagunchunau nalunguva aumnai; nangho koima chunga pohgih pohsah louna dinga, asun ajana na katohjiuva, najah uva Pathen thupha kasei jiu ahi.
Chule atahsan nangho lah-a thengtah-a chonphatah-a themmona beiya iti kachonum, ahetoh a nangho nahiuvin, Pathen jong ahi;
chule, Pathen gam a ding le aloupina a dinga nakoupauva dinga lomtah a nachonna dingu tia,
apan achate ahil banga keihon jong nangho amichang kima thu kahiluva, katilkhou jiuva chule kahettoh sah jiu nahiuve, hichu nanghon naheuve.

Chule hiche jeh jong hin tang louhelin Pathen kathangvah jingui, nanghon keihoa kona thu, Pathen thu najah uva chu, mihem thu ahi tia hilouva, Pathen thu tia nalah-u ahibouve; hichu tahmong ahi, chujongle hiche chun atahsan nangho lah-a na atonge.
Ajeh chu sopiteho, nangho Judea gama Christa a um Pathen Houbungho umchan joma nahitauve; amahon Judah mihoa kona athoh banga nanghon jong nagam miteuva kona chutobangma chu nathoh-u ahitai;
amaho chun Pakai Jesu jong themgaoho jong athauva, chule keiho jong eino mangu ahin, Pathen alunglhaisah louvu ahi, chule mi jouse toh kilekal ahiuve;
amahon keiho chidang namdangho huhhinga aumna dinguva, thu kaseipeh dingu eikhamui; achonsetnau bukip molso jing ahiuve; ahinla lunghan khonna achunguvah achunai.
Ahin, sopiteho, lunga hilouva tahsa lama nanghotoh kikhena kaum tahdi jeh hin, kangai lot’un namaiyu mu ding kakihabol chehjin ahi;
hichena ding chun, keiho ahideh chu keima Paul, khatvei nivei nangho heng lama hung ding kakigot ahitai, ahin satanin eisumojin ahi.
Kakinepnau, kakipanau, chule kaloupinau, lallukhuh chu iham? Pakai Jesu Christa hung tengle, ama anga ding nangho nahi louvu ham?
Ahi, tahbeh-in kaloupi nau le kakipana dingu nangho nahiuve.
Hiche jeh-a chu kathoh jou loutah phat uva, Athens khoa kachanga eikidalhah pha kasatauvin ahi;

hiche hesoh thoh jeh-a chu koima alunglao naum louna dinguva, nangho phutdet dingle tahsan thu lama nalung monsah dinguva, Christa thupha lama Pathen lhacha panpi isopiu Timothy nahenguva kahinsolu ahi;
ajeh chu hesoh thoh dinga pang kahiuve, hichu nanghon nahenauve.
Hesoh thoh ding ihiuve, tia masanga nangho koma kaum laiyuva kaseisau ahi; chujouvin kati bang chun asohtan ahi, chule hichu nanghon naheuvin ahi.
Hiche jehtah chun keiman jong kathoh theitapon ajole, lhem chun nangho lhemtaleu chun katoh gimnau moh hikhante, tia hiche jeh a chu natahsan jeu chu he dinga kahinsolu ahi.
Ahin tun Timothy’n nangho koma konin ahungin Kipana Thupha, natahsan jeule nangailut jeu, chule nangho mu katup banga nanghon neimu nomu phatecha neigeldoh jingu thu ahinpoh phat hin,
sopiteho, nangho tahsan thudola keiho kahesoh gentheinauva kalung mongui;
ajeh chu tua nangho Pakaiya naumdet jingule, keiho ahinga kahitauve.
Namaiyu kamu theina dingu le natahsan bulhin lounau kasuh bulhit theina dingun asun ajanin kahatao dehset jengui;
kaPathen angah nachunguva kakipanau jouse hin nangho chungchanga Pathen itobang tah-a kathangvah thei dingu hitam?
I-Pau Pathenin chule i-Pakaiyu Jesun nangho heng lama eipuiyu hen.
Chule i-Pakaiyu Jesu amithengte jouse toh ahung tengle ama hung teng chule i-Pau Pathen anga nalungu thengsela themmona beiya alha theina dingin,
nangho kangailut bangu hin nangho khat le khat kingailutna le mi jouse ngailutna a Pakai chun nangailutnau chu belap cheh belap cheh hen, letset sah hen.

Chuti ahile, sopite, achaina keiyin, keihon Pakai Jesua nangho chu kajoluva katilkhou nahiuve, chutia chu Pathen lunglhaisahna dinga iti chon ding ham ti thudol chu keihoa kona nalah bangu, tua nachon bang bangu chun chon jom jingun, neiletset jing jengun.
Ajeh chu Pakai Jesua nangho ipi thu thu kapeh-u kathupeh chengseu chu nanghon nahenauve.
Nangho nathen dingu chu Pathen lunglam ahi; hichu jona konin kikang seuvin,
chule Pathen helou chidang namdangho banga huh pan louvin,
thengsel le jabolin nangma nangma bel cheh phatea kivopje heleu chun ahi;
chonvalin koiman hiche thudola hin asopi duhan boldahen; ajeh chu masanga nangho kaseipehsau kahettohsahsau banga chu, hitiho phu la a chu Pakai ahi.
Pathenin eiho aboh dinga hilouva atheng ding joh a eikouvu ahibouve;
Hijeh chun ajop lou chun mihem ajop lou hita louvin, Alhagao Theng napepau Pathen chu ajop lou ahi.
Kisopi ngailut thudola vang hinsun louleng kinkhoh ahipoi; ajeh chu khat le khat kingailut dingje Pathena kona kihilsate nahiuve.
Chule Macedonia gama cheng sopite chunga hichu nabolu ahi. Ahivangin, sopite, katil nahiuve, halet’in neilet chehleu chun kati;
chule kathupeh bangu chun, kangkhencha umje kichuh un, nangma kincheh kibolun chule nakhut tah-a nakitoh kihabolleu chun kati.
chutile polama um miho chunga ngeikeicha a naum thei dingu ahi, chule lhahsamna nanei louhel dingu ahi.
Sopiteho, kinepna bei midangho banga nangho lungkhama naum louna dingun, aihmumil teho thudol helouva naum dingu kanompoi.
Jesu athin athoudoh kittai, ti hi itahsanuva ahile, Pathenin Jesua ihmumil teho jong chu amatoh thakhat’a ahinpui ding ahi, ti iheuve.
Hiche jeh a chu Pakai thua kona hiche thu hi kaseipeh nahiuve, eiho Pakai hung geiya anahing nalai chengse hi aihmusaho sanga itinama jongle masajo lou ding ihiuve.
Ajeh chu Pakai chu amatah aotoh, vantil pipui awgintoh, chule Pathen sumkon gintoh, kithoa vana kona hung kumlha ding ahi; chule Christa a thisaho chengse thoudoh ding ahiuve;
chujou le eiho ahingnalai amoh chengse hi amaho chengse chutoh vanlaijola Pakai lamto dinga mei konga toltouva ium khom dingu; chule chutia chu aimatih chana Pakaitoh iumkhom jing dingu ahi.
Hiche jeh chun hiti thu hin nangho khat le khat kilhamon touvin.
Ahivangin, sopiteho, hiche chu anikho le aphat thudol nahenguva hinsut ding angaipoi.
ajehchu jana gucha ahung banga Pakai nikho chu hung ding ahi, hichu nanghon kichenin naheuve.

Mihon, “Chamna le lungmon chule bitna aume,” tia asei laitah ule numei naoso nat banga, phulou helouva manthahna chu achunguva hungchu phung jeng ding ahi; hitia chu amaho chu itinama jongle sohcha lou ding ahiuve.
Ahivangin, sopiteho, gucha banga hiche nikho chu nachunguva ahung lhun ding chu nangho muthima uma nahipouve;
nangho nabonchauvin khovah le sunlai chate nahiuve; eiho jan le muthim mi ihipouve.
Hiche jeh chun, sopiteho, midang ho banga ihmulouvin, limgehchan kihongpha jingin umuhite.
Aihmuho khu janlebou ihmujia ahiuve; chule jukham ho jong janlebou akham jiuve.
Eiho vang sunlai chate ihi jeh-un, tahsan le ngailut ompho kiko-thou hite, chule huhhinga um kinepna chu lukhuh-a neiyin limgeh chan hahjingin umu hite.
Ajeh chu lungsat chuhna dinga hilouva, i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga huhhing chu ichan theina dinguva, Pathenin eipansah-u ahi;
eiho hahjing jongleu hen, ihmujong leu hen, Christa toh ihinkhomna dinguva, Ama eiho dinga thia ahitai.
Hijeh chun nabol bangu chun khat le khat kitilkhouvin kisadoh ton umun.
Sopiteho, nahenguva kahung tao ahi, nalah uva natonggima chule Pakaiya nachunguva kitunga nangho natilkhouho chu heuvin.
Amaho chu anatoh jalu chun ngailutna-in hajan jabolun. Nangho kitohdel chehchan umun.
Chule, sopiteho, kahintil nahiuve, angai dol louva chonho chu phohsalun, hilchah-un, alung doiya tilkhouvun, ahatmo athadoi huvin lang, mijouse koma kidohat’un.
Chingtheiyun, koiman asea chu asen thuh hihhen; ahin khat le khat chule mi jouse phatna ding bolnan kihabol cheh-un.
Kipah thanom jingun;
tantih neilouvin tao jingun;
imajousea thangvah jingin umun; hichu Jesu Christa a nangho chunga Pathen lunglam ahi.
Lhagao Theng chu sumit hih-un.
Lhagao thu seidoh ho chu musit hih un.
Imalam jouse patep cheh-un lang, apha chu tuhdet jingun;
aphalou jousea konin kikhin mang-un.
Chule cham konna Pathenin nangho kimkeiyin thensah un; chule i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung tengle nangho chengse lhagao, nahinnau chule natahsau themmona beiyin koihen.
Nangho nakoupau chu tahsan umtah ahi, ama chun hichu bolpeh nauvinate.
Sopiteho, keiho dingin neitao peh un.
Kibengchop thengin sopite jouse salam-un.
Keiman nangho Pakaiya kahahsela hiche thu hi kapeh nahiuve, hiche lekha hi sopite jouse angah nasimun.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa milungsetnan umpiuvin.
